markdownRemark.excerpt: As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s class tonight (Sunday, Dec. 21st, 2008) will be CANCELLED, due to weather…
markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s class tonight (Sunday, Dec. 21st, 2008) will be CANCELLED, due to weather conditions. We apologize for any inconvenience.

Please pass on this message.

frontmatter.title: Darul-Ḥadīth planning for The Book of Prayer Intensive Course
